features: TV aerial cable with gold-plated connectors: Enjoy clear, interference-free picture and sound with corrosion-resistant IEC male-to-male plugs - ideal for digital TV, FM and DAB reception.
90° right angle or straight plug design: Choose the best fit for wall-mounted TVs and tight spaces - easy connection without straining your aerial port.
Wide UK compatibility: Works with all standard IEC aerial sockets, TVs, PVRs and set-top boxes - including Freeview, Freesat, Sky Box, BT TV and YouView.
Flexible installation with included coupler: Extend or join two coax cables using the female-to-female adapter for neat, customised setups.
Multiple lengths and soft flexible jacket: Available in 0.5m to 10m - routes smoothly along walls and corners for a clean, professional look.
description: From the brand Previous page G-PLUG Best Sellers Visit the store Explore G-PLUG Products Visit the store G-PLUG stands for a trusted team of professionals dedicated to providing premium cables at fair prices that excel through their excellent quality and design. We have been in the industry for a while now and have a strong foothold among home and corporate users. We have achieved phenomenal success in consistently delivering high-quality Internet, TV and broadband cables, and would continue to do excellent work in 2023. How we get our start? G-PLUG started in the United Kingdom, founded by a group of passionate and innovative young people. What makes our products unique? GINDAIRA is the only official store for authentic G-PLUG products across the USA, UK, and EU. Focusing on consumer electronics, G-PLUG provides products in categories like data cables, audio & video accessories, TV and telephone cables, brush faceplates, and more. Why we love what we do? After the first year, G-PLUG has now become the Top Brand in the cables and accessory industry. Next page
